risks.title: Live-class regressions during sync consolidation
mitigation: Use release flag and kill switch
Run mobile and reconnect regression suites
Keep compatibility fallback during one release window

risks.title: Data loss during local-to-server migration
mitigation: Dual-read and parity verification
Do not destructively delete local state before validation
Add rollback path to local reads

risks.title: Deployment ambiguity causes misconfigured production release
mitigation: Approve one canonical frontend host
Document environment promotion path
Block deploys on incomplete checks

risks.title: Feature flags remain non-operative as release controls
mitigation: Implement runtime gate layer
Require expiry metadata for new flags
Add flag validation to release checklist

risks.title: Content migration from bundled JS takes longer than expected
mitigation: Start with manifests for highest-traffic subjects first
Keep hybrid mode behind migration flag
Automate content export pipeline

risks.title: Observability blind spots delay incident response
mitigation: Add production error tracking
Create release-health dashboard
Define alert thresholds and owners

risks.title: TypeScript migration expands scope and slows delivery
mitigation: Limit initial migration to services and hooks
Do not require full app conversion in phase 1
Use typed boundaries first

risks.title: Privacy obligations are assumed incorrectly
mitigation: Confirm data residency and retention requirements
Review student-data handling with stakeholder
Add deletion and export policy before major migrations

risks.title: Internal-only pages continue shipping to end users
mitigation: Review routes for product relevance
Move QA and educational pages to docs or protected tools
Add navigation ownership review

risks.title: CDN/object storage migration breaks PDF access paths
mitigation: Publish manifests with fallback URLs during cutover
Run availability checks on high-traffic PDFs
Roll out subject by subject
